title: Pterophylla serrata
taxonomy: Pterophylla serrata is classified within the genus Pterophylla and the family Phyllolepididae. This classification indicates its placement within the group of extinct insects. The genus Pterophylla belongs to the order Paleodictyoptera, which is a group of ancient insects. This classification is based on the fossil record and paleontological studies. The family Phyllolepididae is characterized by its unique wing structure, which is often used to distinguish it from other related families.

parts: Pterophylla serrata, also known as the Sawtooth Oak, is a tree species native to North America.
